title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXVII. Lullabies.
content:
Hush thee, my babby,
        Lie still with thy daddy,
            Thy mammy has gone to the mill,
        To grind thee some wheat,
        To make thee some meat,
            And so, my dear babby, lie still.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXVII. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
